creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
> Here's what I did on the patch I fetched:
>
> # patch < ~anarcat/vorbis-tools.diff

It probably would have worked better if you'd given the -p1 option to
"patch"--sorry for the confusion. Would you mind having another go?  I've
made a little tarball of the port skeleton:

	http://people.freebsd.org/~trevor/ports/vorbis-tools.tar.gz

Just unpack it under /usr/ports/audio/ after moving your existing
vorbis-tools directory away (or maybe just deleting it).
-- 
Trevor Johnson
http://jpj.net/~trevor/gpgkey.txt
